criteria.reason: Active detail card can create pending version proposals through Telegram.
Detail card includes same-industry/type version candidates.
Rollback activates selected target and disables only the current context version.
Both new-version and rollback actions write decision records.
No migration/deploy is needed for future accepted versions or rollbacks.
Local tests and production smoke checks passed.

commands_run: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_industry_patterns.py tests/test_service_keyword_scoring.py tests/test_beauty_service_optimization.py tests/test_service_problem_regeneration.py tests/test_worker_services_quality.py tests/test_content_plan_generation.py
